headline: Baker Hughes (BKR) Secures Long-Term Service Agreement for ANOH Gas Plant
summary: Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) is one of the best stocks to invest in under $100. On June 23, Baker Hughes announced a significant long-term service agreement with ANOH Gas Processing Company/AGPC for the ANOH Gas Processing Plant in Nigeria. The contract covers lifecycle support, including parts, repair services, and engineering advisory for the facility’s critical […]

headline: Basin rig count down five as prices climb
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was down five this week, the latest count Friday by Baker Hughes shows, with 256 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 265 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up one from last week at 581 rigs. A year ago, 537 rigs were active. The count shows that 445 rigs sought oil, unchanged from the previous week, and 126 explored ...
